item.title: Qwen3.5-27B (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 27B License: open Type: model "Qwen3.5 represents a significant leap forward, integrating breakthroughs in multimodal learning, architectural efficiency, reinforcement learning scale, and global accessibility"

item.title: LFM2-24B-A2B (Liquid AI)
item.description: Parameters: 24B License: open Type: model "a traditional instruct model without reasoning traces."

item.title: Mercury 2 (Inception)
item.description: Parameters: 180B License: open Type: model Diffusion large language model (dLLM).

item.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 3000B License: open Type: model Knowledge cutoff still=January 2025. Announce: https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-3-1-pro/

item.title: ZUNA (Zyphra)
item.description: Parameters: 0.38B License: open Type: model For BCI, 'thought-to-text'. Training dataset calcs: (2M hours * 3,600 seconds/hour * 256 samples/second ) / 32 samples/token = 57.6B tokens (refined to 45.1B after rigorous filtering ); 150,000 steps * 2.16M tokens/batch = 324B total tokens seen during training. Announce: https://www.zyphra.com/post/zuna

item.title: Grok 4.2 (xAI)
item.description: Parameters: 3000B License: open Type: model No details provided. Announce: https://x.com/elonmusk/status/2023829664318583105

item.title: INTELLECT-3.1 (Prime Intellect)
item.description: Parameters: 106B License: open Type: model Base: GLM-4.5-Air-Base, INTELLECT-3 model. 106BA12B.

item.title: Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: 400B License: open Type: model 1M context. Announce: https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-sonnet-4-6 Showing GMMLU (Global MMLU by Cohere).

item.title: Tiny Aya (Cohere)
item.description: Parameters: 3.35B License: open Type: model 70+ languages. Showing GMMLU (Global MMLU by Cohere).

item.title: Qwen3.5-397B-A17B (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 397B License: open Type: model "Qwen3.5 represents a significant leap forward, integrating breakthroughs in multimodal learning, architectural efficiency, reinforcement learning scale, and global accessibility"

item.title: JoyAI-LLM Flash (JD Open Source)
item.description: Parameters: 48B License: open Type: model 48B-A3B.

item.title: MiniMax-M2.5 (MiniMax)
item.description: Parameters: 230B License: open Type: model 230B-A10B. HLE showing without tools.

item.title: GLM-5 (Z.AI)
item.description: Parameters: 744B License: open Type: model 744B-A40B. Announce: https://z.ai/blog/glm-5

item.title: Nanbeige4.1-3B (Nanbeige)
item.description: Parameters: 3B License: open Type: model SOTA for size (3B)

item.title: RynnBrain-30B-A3B (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 30B License: open Type: model Base: Qwen3-VL-30B-A3B-Instruct. "an embodied foundation model grounded in physical reality."

item.title: Claude Opus 4.6 (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: 5000B License: open Type: model

item.title: Intern-S1-Pro (Shanghai AI Laboratory/SenseTime)
item.description: Parameters: 1000B License: open Type: model 1000TA22B. Assumes base model of Qwen3. "Built upon a 235B MoE language model and a 6B Vision encoder, Intern-S1 has been further pretrained on 5 trillion tokens of multimodal data"

item.title: Step 3.5 Flash (StepFun)
item.description: Parameters: 196B License: open Type: model 196B-A11B.

item.title: Assistant_Pepe_8B (Independent)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model Warning for inappropriate content. Base: Llama-3.1-Nemotron-8B. "trained it on an extended 4chan dataset" "the original, gpt4chan (by Yannic Kilcher) scored especially high in truthfulness (that was b4 benchmaxxing)... outperformed the base tune (the unabliterated one), it also changed its political alignment... People were initially joking about the "alignment tax", I think there's a none trivial substance in all of this. It seems to me just above a marginal error or statistical noise."

item.title: Trinity-Large (Arcee AI)
item.description: Parameters: 400B License: open Type: model 400BA13B. "we worked closely with Prime Intellect. They not only served the H100 clusters Datology used to generate synthetic data, they have been deeply involved in helping scale our training setup to the GPU footprint required for a fully frontier sized model, including the current 2048 B300 GPU configuration for Trinity Large."

item.title: SERA (Allen AI)
item.description: Parameters: 32B License: open Type: model Base: Qwen3-32B. SERA=Soft-verified Efficient Repository Agents. "SERA was built largely by a single Ai2 researcher." https://allenai.org/blog/open-coding-agents "SERA-32B was trained using Soft Verified Generation (SVG), a simple and efficient method that is 26x cheaper than reinforcement learning and 57x cheaper than previous synthetic data methods to reach equivalent performance. The total cost for data generation and training is approximately $2,000 (40 GPU-days)."

item.title: Kimi K2.5 (Moonshot AI)
item.description: Parameters: 1000B License: open Type: model 1TA32B. 1T parameters and 384 experts. Open source SOTA. "Kimi K2.5 builds on Kimi K2 [15.5T tokens] with continued pretraining over approximately 15T mixed visual and text tokens. [+ 15T=30.5T]"

item.title: GLM-4.7-Flash (Z.AI)
item.description: Parameters: 30B License: open Type: model 30B-A3B.

item.title: MedGemma 1.5 4B (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 4B License: open Type: model Lower MMLU score compared to previous MedGemma 1 27B (67.2 v 87). Announce: https://research.google/blog/next-generation-medical-image-interpretation-with-medgemma-15-and-medical-speech-to-text-with-medasr/

item.title: FrogBoss (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 32B License: open Type: model Base: Qwen3-32B.

item.title: EDEN (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 28B License: closed Type: model "EDEN (environmentally-derived evolutionary network) family of metagenomic foundation models, including a 28 billion parameter model trained on 9.7 trillion nucleotide tokens from BaseData1 . This dataset, at the time of training, contained more than 10 billion novel genes from over 1 million new species, and is intentionally enriched for environmental and host-associated metagenomes, phage sequences, and mobile genetic elements, enabling the model to learn from diverse and novel cross-species evolutionary mechanisms and apply them to key challenges in human health."

item.title: Baichuan-M3 (Baichuan)
item.description: Parameters: 235B License: open Type: model "new-generation medical-enhanced large language model"

item.title: Engram (DeepSeek-AI)
item.description: Parameters: 39.5B License: partial Type: model 39.5BA3.8B. "we explore conditional memory as a complementary sparsity axis, instantiated via Engram, a module that modernizes classic N -gram embeddings for O ( 1 ) lookup."

item.title: SleepFM (Stanford)
item.description: Parameters: 0.091B License: open Type: model Uses a leave-one-out contrastive learning approach to align brain activity (EEG), heart activity (ECG), and respiratory signals. 130+ disease categories and 19–20+ clinical PSG channels. Dataset ~12.63B (Calculated based on 585,000 hours of data across 3 modality groups using 5-second window tokens) x 10 epochs.

item.title: TimeCapsuleLLM-v2-1800-1875 (Independent)
item.description: Parameters: 1.2B License: open Type: model 112GB dataset=30B tokens x 0.5 epochs = 15B tokens.

item.title: Jamba2 (AI21)
item.description: Parameters: 52B License: open Type: model 52B-A12B. Pre-training tokens from Jamba=1.2T + 500B mid.

item.title: LFM2.5 (Liquid AI)
item.description: Parameters: 1.2B License: open Type: model For on-device agentic applications. "Extended pre-training from 10T to 28T tokens and large-scale multi-stage reinforcement learning."

item.title: MiroThinker v1.5 (MiroMindAI)
item.description: Parameters: 235B License: open Type: model Base: Qwen3 235B-A22B. Official demo: https://dr.miromind.ai

item.title: Falcon-H1R (TII)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model Base model: Falcon-H1 (May/2025). Announce: https://huggingface.co/blog/tiiuae/falcon-h1r-7b
